mapper.select: Select ProductID, Title, Price, City, District, CategoryName, CoverImage, Type, Address, DealOfTheDay, ProductStatus, SlugUrl From Product inner join Category on Product.ProductCategory=Category.CategoryID where ProductStatus=1
mapper.insert: insert into Product (Title, Price, City, District, CoverImage, Address, Description, Type, DealOfTheDay, AdvertisementDate, ProductStatus, ProductCategory, AppUserId) values (#{title}, #{price}, #{city}, #{district}, #{coverImage}, #{address}, #{description}, #{type}, #{dealOfTheDay}, #{advertisementDate}, #{productStatus}, #{productCategory}, #{appUserId})
mapper.update: Update Product set ProductStatus=1 where ProductID=#{id}
Update Product set ProductStatus=0 where ProductID=#{id}
mapper.select: Select ProductID, Title, Price, City, District, CategoryName, CoverImage, Type, Address, DealOfTheDay From Product inner join Category on Product.ProductCategory=Category.CategoryID where AppUserId=#{id} And ProductStatus=1

Select ProductID, Title, Price, City, District, CategoryName, CoverImage, Type, Address, DealOfTheDay From Product inner join Category on Product.ProductCategory=Category.CategoryID where AppUserId=#{id} And ProductStatus=0

Select ProductID, Title, Price, City, District, CategoryName, CoverImage, Type, Address, DealOfTheDay, ProductStatus, SlugUrl From Product inner join Category on Product.ProductCategory=Category.CategoryID where ProductStatus=1 Order By ProductID Desc Limit 5
